scripts.build: npm run build -w @inventory/contracts && npm run db:generate && npm run build -w @inventory/api && npm run build -w @inventory/desktop
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @inventory/contracts && concurrently -k -n API,DESKTOP -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @inventory/api" "npm run dev -w @inventory/desktop"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @inventory/contracts && npm run db:generate && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.start:render: npm run db:deploy && npm run db:seed && node apps/api/dist/main.js
